## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs/content
- [ ] Test improvements
- [ ] Maintenance/refactor

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Privacy and Safety Check

- [ ] No telemetry or analytics added
- [ ] No remote code behavior added
- [ ] No account/cloud sync behavior added
- [ ] Permissions impact documented (if applicable)

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know (tradeoffs, known limits, follow-ups).
